For project developers

Turn your land work intoreal climate finance.

Foovante helps African renewable-energy, agriculture, and forestry projects generate, verify, and sell carbon credits, without London middlemen taking 40%. Built in Accra, for projects on the continent.

Apply to list your project →
~12 wks

Core methodologies supported
3
Active projects · baseline phase
10
Smallholder programs
How to list

Four steps from project to verified carbon asset.

The carbon verification process has historically taken years. Crevy is built to get African projects from zero documentation to audit-ready in weeks, not years because we have already built the standards framework for you.

01

Submit Your Project

Tell us about your project. Share your project type, location, and any prior documentation. Our team reviews your submission and onboards you to the Crevy platform.

Free · No commitment · Agriculture, Energy, Waste
02

Build Your Evidence Trail

IoT monitoring begins and your project record starts accumulating real-time MRV data. Every data point is timestamped and feeds directly into your verification dossier.

MRV framework · IoT integration · International standards aligned
03

Pre-Verification

Your project moves through our pre-verification pipeline. Our team including our Verification Lead and Article 6 Expert assembles your audit-ready dossier aligned with Ghana CMO and international frameworks.

Ghana CMO aligned · International frameworks · Local verification agents
04

List and Connect to Buyers

Your verified project connects to global buyers through the Crevy marketplace. Buyers receive full traceability and CSRD-ready documentation. Your community receives a minimum 25% of credit revenue.

Fully traceable · CSRD-ready · 25% community benefit-sharing
How we verify

Every project, documented and evidenced.

You shouldn't have to take our word for any credit. Crevy builds a continuous evidence trail from the moment a project is onboarded — combining IoT monitoring, on-the-ground verification, and international framework alignment. Every buyer gets the full audit trail.

01

Project Documentation

Project developers document their sustainable practices on Crevy from day one. Every activity is recorded, timestamped, and stored as part of the verification evidence trail.

Document · Monitor · Report · Verify
02

Real-Time MRV Monitoring

IoT sensor data feeds continuously into your project record. Every data point builds the evidence auditors and standards bodies need to issue credits.

MRV framework · IoT integration · Real-time data
03

Local Verification

Our on-the-ground team — including our Verification Lead and Article 6 Expert — conducts assessments and assembles the verification dossier. We work with local agents who know the land and the communities.

Ghana CMO aligned · Local agents · International frameworks
04

Pre-Verification Pipeline

Projects move through our structured pre-verification process aligned with international carbon standards. From zero documentation to audit-ready in weeks, not years.

International frameworks · Ghana CMO · CSRD-ready output

Want the full protocol — telemetry specs, AGB formulas, and the on-chain payload schema? Read the scientific notebook →

Methodology library

6 core methodologies. Pick the one that fits your land.

Foovante is building toward full Verra, Gold Standard, and Plan Vivo catalog coverage. These six methodologies cover the vast majority of qualifying African land types and are supported on the platform today.

VCS · VM0007

REDD+ avoided deforestation

Verra-approved framework for forests at risk of deforestation. Suited to community forest reserves with 5+ years of land-tenure history.

Min. size 2,000 haCrediting 40 years
VCS · VM0042

Agriculture · ARR

Afforestation, reforestation, and revegetation on degraded land. Excellent for smallholder agroforestry cooperatives.

Min. size 500 haCrediting 30 years
GS · TPDDTEC

Improved cookstoves

Gold Standard methodology for fuel-efficient or clean-burning household cookstoves. Strong community co-benefits.

Min. size 5,000 HHCrediting 7 years
VCS · VMD0033

Solar microgrid

Off-grid renewable electricity provision in unelectrified or diesel-dependent communities. Pairs well with productive-use loads.

Min. size 1 MWCrediting 15 years
Plan Vivo · PV4

Mangrove restoration

Blue carbon restoration in estuarine and coastal mangrove ecosystems. High permanence, strong biodiversity co-benefits.

Min. size 200 haCrediting 25 years
GS · MM2

Biogas / methane capture

Methane capture and combustion from municipal organic waste, livestock manure, or wastewater treatment.

Min. size 2,000 t/yrCrediting 10 years
What we look for

Four things every listed project must have.

We review every application individually. These are the four non-negotiables everything else we can work with you on.

P1

African projects only

We focus exclusively on Sub-Saharan African projects. Every member of our verification team operates on the continent.

P2

Land tenure and community consent documented

We require proof of land rights and free, prior, and informed consent from affected communities before listing.

P3

Eligible under at least one major standard

Projects must be eligible for Verra VCS, Gold Standard, or Plan Vivo certification. We'll help you find the right methodology.

P4

Standards-anchored, on-chain serialised

Every credit issued under Verra, Gold Standard, or Plan Vivo. Every tonne hashed and serialised so any buyer can trace it back to the polygon it came from.

Start your application

Tell us about your project. We'll be back within 24 hours.

A quick application. You'll need a rough outline of your project area, your contact details, and any existing verification documents if available.

From the network
"Before Foovante we waited 18 months for our first credit issuance. With them, eleven weeks. The team in Accra actually understood what our co-op needed."
Kwame Boadi
Lead, Akagera Agroforestry Co-op
